title: Housekeeping Attendant (Evening shift- Part time): Waldorf Astoria Helsinki
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Start your next career step as a Housekeeping Attendant (Evening shift- Part time): Waldorf Astoria Helsinki at SC Hotels Operations Oy, Helsinki.
description: Waldorf Astoria Helsinki is seeking an Evening Housekeeping Attendant for a part-time position with SC Hotels Operations Oy. This role involves providing exceptional guest service by ensuring each room is impeccably prepared and maintaining the hotel's signature luxury experience. Key responsibilities include performing turndown services, changing bed linens, replenishing amenities, and disposing of waste in line with sustainability guidelines. The candidate should have excellent communication skills in fluent English, a professional appearance, and previous hospitality experience. This position offers an opportunity to work independently while contributing to the hotel's commitment to exceptional guest service and operational excellence.
what_we_expect: Fluent English communication skills (additional languages are an advantage)
Impeccable grooming and professional presentation in line with luxury brand standards
Previous housekeeping or hospitality experience preferred
Strong attention to detail and commitment to cleanliness and presentation
A passion for delivering exceptional guest service
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
job_responsibilities: Provide turndown service, including but not limited to partially removing and neatly storing bedcovers, fulfilling guest preferences, and replenishing amenities, linens, and supplies
Change bed linens if needed and ensure presentation aligns with brand expectations
Replenish all guest amenities, linens, and in-room supplies
Vacuum floors and remove waste, maintaining a spotless environment
Conduct a thorough visual inspection of each room upon completion
Dispose of waste and recyclables in line with the hotels sustainability guidelines
what_we_offer: Valid working visa
Housekeeping Attendant (Evening shift- Part time): Waldorf Astoria Helsinki
Specifically, you will be responsible for performing the following tasks to the highest standards

title: Full-time lesson teacher (Kietu, traveling teacher), KIEKU teaching
salary_range: Salary according to municipal employment and co
meta_description: Apply now for a Full-time lesson teacher (Kietu, traveling teacher), KIEKU teaching role at Joensuun kaupunki.
description: We are looking for an enthusiastic teacher of language and culture groups to join our team in Joensuu, who is competent and promotes language-aware teaching. Our KIEKU education program, known for its communal culture and skilled professionals, offers a variety of positions from preparatory teaching to linguistically supported and native language teaching. We are seeking an experienced teacher with pedagogical skills to support students in different subjects and multilingual learners. The ideal candidate will work closely with other teachers and familiarize themselves with the Keuku team members. This role involves teaching students across various schools, including history teaching and Russian-supported lessons for elementary and middle school age.
what_we_expect: Experience in teaching multilingual students in primary and secondary school
Knowledge and skills of language-aware teaching
Readiness to work with learners of different ages
Good language skills (Finnish, Russian)
Good group management, cooperation and interaction skills, ability for e.g. Teamwork and multiprofessional cooperation and genuine interaction with both students and staff
job_responsibilities: Teach students from different schools in close cooperation with other teachers
Support students in different subjects and experience in teaching multilingual learners
Experience in teaching multilingual students in primary and secondary school,
what_we_offer: Salary according to municipal employment and collective agreements
Trial period of six (6) months
Experience in teaching multilingual students in primary and secondary school,
search_keywords: full-time lesson teacher, traveling teacher, teaching language and culture groups, Joensuu, pedagogical skills, multilingual learners, Finnish, Russian, group management, cooperation, interaction skills, ICT as a natural part of teaching

title: Special Class Teacher
salary_range: Salary and probationary period The task-specifi
meta_description: Build your future with Turun normaalikoulu as a Turku Normal School's special class teacher's two temporary positions 1 August 2026-31 July 2027 in Turku.
description: Turku Normal School is seeking two special class teachers for temporary positions from August 1, 2026, to July 31, 2027. The primary school position offers studies and/or experience in special education classes as an additional merit. Ideal candidates should have a qualification as a special class teacher with at least two years of work experience post-graduation, be able to interact individually with students and guardians, build safe learning environments, and actively participate in developing learning support practices and school community development. The salary is YPJ:n mukainen, and the position includes a six-month trial period before starting work.
what_we_expect: Qualification of a special class teacher and good teaching skills
Two years of work experience as a special education teacher after graduation
The ability to meet students and their guardians individually and the ability to build a safe learning environment
job_responsibilities: Supporting students' well-being and planning implementation of both group-specific support and student-specific support in close cooperation with class teachers, subject teachers, and other school staff.
Supervising teaching trainees as a safe and pedagogically strong instructor who supports their professional growth and guides them in collaboration with other teacher education professionals.
Qualification of a special class teacher and good teaching skills
what_we_offer: An interesting and responsible teaching position in a training school as part of the Faculty of Education of the University of Turku, offering excellent opportunities to develop professional skills both in your work as a teacher and as a supervisor of teaching trainees.
Access to modern teaching facilities and necessary tools.
Read more about us on the [Welcome to us to work](https://www.utu.fi/fi/yliopisto/tule-meille-toin) page, where you can learn more about what the university offers its employees.
search_keywords: special class teacher, special education, teaching skills, two years experience

title: DSV Nurmijärvi is looking for terminal workers!
salary_range: The work starts when suitable people are found. Salary 15.64 - 17.70 €/h and the determination takes into account your previous experience and education.
meta_description: Build your future with Amiko Vantaa Oy as a DSV Nurmijärvi is looking for terminal workers! in Kerava. Learn more about the role and apply now.
description: DSV Nurmijärvi is seeking motivated terminal workers to join their team in Nurmijärvi. The role involves handling collections, container unloading, shelving, and labeling tasks. Suitable candidates will be offered long-term employment with competitive salaries ranging from 15.64 - 17.70 €/h. Education or previous experience in logistics, warehouse work, or transportation is required. Motivated individuals who can handle shifts are encouraged to apply. The position offers a stable career path within a respected logistics company and access to ongoing skill development opportunities. For more information, visit Amiko Vantaa Oy's website.
what_we_expect: Education in the field or previous experience in logistics, warehouse work or transportation
Motivated, self-initiated and careful approach to work
Good teamwork skills and a desire to do quality and responsible work
Willingness to work in shifts or variable schedules, including Saturday shifts in the busiest weeks
job_responsibilities: You participate versatilely in the daily tasks of logistics and transport, such as receiving goods, collecting, packing, sending and unpacking the container
You use the industry's basic tools and systems, for example a pick-up truck and warehouse management software
what_we_offer: Long-term work in a respected logistics and transportation company
The opportunity to develop your skills alongside experienced professionals
A good working atmosphere, modern tools, and the support of a competent team
search_keywords: terminal workers Nurmijärvi DSV logistics transport
